race.comment: PENINSULA (1) had his first run on dirt for new trainer Richard Simpson last start and got the money by 1.4 lengths at this track over 1200m. Key runner after an impressive transition to this surface. SUPERSTITIOUS (8) finished third when resuming from a spell last start over 1000m at Barcaldine. Could prove tough to stop. BLANC DE NOIR (11) saluted at Barcaldine two runs ago. Not disgraced last time out when fourth over 1000m at Barcaldine, beaten 2.5 lengths. Enjoys a drop in grade so she can return to the winners' list. LOVE CHILD (6) was responsible for a better run last start, beaten 1.3 lengths into fourth over 1000m at Barcaldine. Has her share of ability and is a top-three prospect.
